flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western Technical College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7k → 3.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Technical College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (39.4% → 44.3%).
